description: Reads ZAK source files so the runtime can understand existing logic before authoring new schemas or capabilities. Constrained to the src directory. Cannot traverse outside the project root.

include_extensions.description: File extensions to include. Defaults to [".ts", ".yaml", ".json"].

max_depth.description: Maximum directory traversal depth. Defaults to 2.

path.description: Relative path from project root. Must begin with src/ or capabilities/.
